name: Poppy-Seed Dressing
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Onion juice (Make by grating onions and catching juice in a bowl.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, salt, and mustard.
2. Add vinegar to the mixture.
3. Stir thoroughly.
4. Add onion juice and stir again.
5. Gradually add salad oil, beating constantly until completely combined and thick.
6. Add poppy seeds and beat for a few minutes.
7. Refrigerate.
